name: Round-up Beef (for a Crowd)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge strips of beef in flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Brown the beef in oil.
3. In a large bowl or pot, combine water, catsup, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped onions. Stir well until ingredients are evenly mixed.
4. Heat the mixture until it is hot, then pour over the beef.
5. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cover. Cook covered until the beef is tender, about 2 hours. Stir occasionally.
Serves 20 - 25 and freezes well.
